unexpected_finds.label: D-RELAY-CHAIN-2 waiver mechanism N=1 pattern establishment
unexpected_finds.description: First SIARC-documented use of explicit operator-supplied one-round D-RELAY-CHAIN-2 waiver with dual-witness ratification (agent best-judgment + Claude ratification). Distinct from Consultant 1 failure mode (silent inference); distinct from strict-mode refusal. Provides a third governance posture: 'waiver-with-disclosure-and-ratification'.
unexpected_finds.significance: Governance-pattern; recommend memory promotion at N=2+ (next waiver round). Single-N evidence anchors process viability but not pattern-stability.

unexpected_finds.label: A.3.3 + A.3.6 compounding override flagged (C-183-2)
unexpected_finds.description: Claude verdict identified that A.3.3 (analysis-rejection-pattern weakly favors C) is overridden by A.3.6 (already-adequate dampens C) only because of A.3.6's current state. If A.3.6 flips to NEED-MORE, C re-elevates stronger than neutral. This is a non-monotonic re-vet semantic that the agent's original aggregation logic underweighted.
unexpected_finds.significance: Methodological; future Frontier-class workbook absorptions should test for similar override-via-state-of-counter-input compounding before committing to verdict.

unexpected_finds.label: RATIFY_WITH_AMENDMENT at LOW-MEDIUM band first observed in non-M-axis V0-closure consultation context
unexpected_finds.description: Prior LOW-MEDIUM-band ratifications (slot 151 SELECT_B, slot 152 RATIFY_WITH_AMENDMENT) were on the M10 commitment-paragraph chain. Slot 183 extends LOW-MEDIUM-band single-witness usage to a Frontier-scope ratification under D-RELAY-CHAIN-2 waiver context. The band consistency (LOW-MEDIUM) across both contexts suggests it correctly reflects single-witness reliance + agent-default input dependency irrespective of question class.
unexpected_finds.significance: Cross-context band stability evidence; reinforces 130R section 6.3 aggregation rule applicability beyond original M-axis scope.

unexpected_finds.label: Three independent C-amendments captured in single ratification (n=1 multi-amendment density)
unexpected_finds.description: Slot 183 captured 3 distinct C-amendments (C-183-1 load-bearing mandatory-re-vet tightening; C-183-2 ledger-hygiene compounding flag; C-183-3 ledger-hygiene phrasing tightening). Prior single-witness ratifications (151, 152) typically returned 1-2 C-class amendments. The higher density here may reflect the bundled-3-pick nature of the consultation rather than substantive uncertainty.
unexpected_finds.significance: Methodological pattern observation; if subsequent bundled-multi-pick consultations show similar density, it argues for a bundling-amendment-density bonus factor in BAND aggregation.
